description: Trail session tracking and dashboard for VS Code
viewsContainer.title: Anytime Trail
config.database.storagePath: Directory where `trail.db` is stored. Absolute path or relative to workspace root. Defaults to `.vscode/` when empty.
config.database.backupGenerations: Number of gzip-compressed backup generations to keep for `trail.db`. Each generation is stored as `.bak.N.gz` next to the database file. Range: 1–10.
config.database.backupIntervalDays: Minimum interval in days between backups of `trail.db`. `0` = backup every session (legacy behavior). `1` (default) = at most once per day. Higher values reduce backup frequency.
config.claudeStatus.directory: Directory where `claude-code-status.json` is stored. Absolute path or relative to workspace root. Defaults to `.vscode/trail/agent-status`.
config.memory.ollama.baseUrl: Base URL of the Ollama server used by Memory Chat (default `http://localhost:11434`).
config.memory.chat.model: Ollama model name used for chat responses (e.g. `qwen2.5-coder:14b`).
config.memory.embedding.model: Ollama model name used for query embeddings (default `bge-m3`).
config.memory.rag.bm25Limit: Number of BM25 candidates retrieved from FTS5 before reranking (default 30).
config.memory.rag.vecLimit: Number of vector candidates retrieved before reranking (default 30).
config.memory.rag.finalLimit: Number of final sources stuffed into the chat prompt (default 12).
config.memory.fts.rebuildIntervalMinutes: Interval in minutes for rebuilding the FTS5 index in the background (default 60).
viewsWelcome.aiNote:
[$(edit) Create AI Note](command:anytime-trail.openAiNote)
Share visual information (images, tables) with AI tools.
viewsWelcome.agentMapping:
No Claude Code sessions detected.

The status file is written by the anytime-trail Claude Code hook.
Make sure the hook is installed.

[Install Claude Code Hook](command:anytime-trail.setup)
command.registerMcpToClaudeCode: Register MCP Server to Claude Code (mcp-trail)
